recommendations.title: Asylum
recommendations.overview: A woman becomes very curious about one of her psychiatrist husband's inmates, a man who was found guilty in the murder and disfigurement of his former wife.

recommendations.title: Hell or High Water
recommendations.overview: A divorced dad and his ex-con brother resort to a desperate scheme in order to save their family's farm in West Texas.

recommendations.title: Spread
recommendations.overview: A gigolo must contend with the prospect that he has found true love.

recommendations.title: Perfect Sense
recommendations.overview: In Glasgow, Scotland, while a mysterious pandemic begins to spread around the world, Susan, a brilliant epidemiologist, falls in love with Michael, a skillful cook.

recommendations.title: Outlaw King
recommendations.overview: Forced into exile by the English after being crowned King of Scotland, legendary warrior Robert the Bruce fights to reclaim the throne.

recommendations.title: Hallam Foe
recommendations.overview: Hallam's talent for spying on people reveals his darkest fears-and his most peculiar desires. Driven to expose the true cause of his mother's death, he instead finds himself searching the rooftops of the city for love.

recommendations.title: Young Adam
recommendations.overview: A young drifter working on a river barge disrupts his employers' lives while hiding the fact that he knows more about a dead woman found in the river than he admits.

recommendations.title: Starred Up

recommendations.title: Seven Samurai
recommendations.overview: A samurai answers a village's request for protection after he falls on hard times. The town needs protection from bandits, so the samurai gathers six others to help him teach the people how to defend themselves, and the villagers provide the soldiers

recommendations.title: Dawn of the Planet of the Apes
recommendations.overview: A group of scientists in San Francisco struggle to stay alive in the aftermath of a plague that is wiping out humanity, while Caesar tries to maintain dominance over his community of intelligent apes.
